text:
CO_TRTMT_OT_WK_2_NUM O0402BD OT: Total Minutes Co-treatment Therapy Week 2 NUM 22 This indicates the total number of co-treatment occupational therapy minutes provided in the second week of
stay.
248 INDVDL_SPCH_THRPY_WK_2_NUM INDVDL_SPCH_THRPY_WK_2_NUM O0402CA SLP: Total Minutes Individual Therapy Week 2 NUM 22 This indicates the total number of individual speech-language pathology therapy minutes provided in the second
week of stay.
249 CNCRNT_SPCH_THRPY_WK_2_NUM CNCRNT_SPCH_THRPY_WK_2_NUM
